ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Projected case count */,
  "hospitalization" INTEGER /* Projected hospitalization count */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Projected mortality rate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast (e.g., manual input, automated system) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "forecast_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  "forecast_status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., draft, published, revised) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team responsible for the model */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_url" TEXT /* URL where more information about the model can be found */,
  "model_publication_date" TEXT /* Date the model was first published */,
  "model_last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "healthcare_capacity" INTEGER /* Healthcare capacity (e.g., number of hospital beds, ICU beds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, policymaker, researcher) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the forecast */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
